ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Player's birthdate */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight (in kg) */,
  "footedness" TEXT /* Player's footedness (e.g., Left, Right, Both) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Player's market value (in million euros) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the team is active */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "matchday" INTEGER /* Matchday number in the season */,
  "team_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Scheduled, Played, Postponed) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., League, Cup, Friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "shots_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of shots conceded */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "balls_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of balls recovered */,
  "accurate_passes" INTEGER /* Number of accurate passes */,
  "pass_percentage" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  "second_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of second yellow cards */,
  "first_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of first yellow cards */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the player (in meters) */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Player's top speed (in km/h) */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals scored by the player */,
  "expected_assists" REAL /* Expected assists made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that participated in the session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who led the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., tactical, physical, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to recover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid (in million euros) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
